resources.string: Maintains SSH connections and loaded pubkeys
Touch this box to gather randomness: %1$d%% done
In order to assure randomness during the key generation, move your finger randomly over the box below.
WARNING: REMOTE HOST IDENTIFICATION HAS CHANGED!
IT IS POSSIBLE THAT SOMEONE IS DOING SOMETHING NASTY!\nSomeone could be eavesdropping on you right now (man-in-the-middle attack)!\nIt is also possible that the host key has just been changed.
Are you sure you want\nto continue connecting?
The authenticity of host \'%1$s\' can\'t be established.
Size of scrollback buffer to keep in memory for each console
Keep back-ups of the private keys using Android\'s backup mechanism
Tap console to show title bar and access menu
Swipe the left third of the screen to send pg up/dn to the terminal
Hide status bar while in console
On hardware keyboards, number keys send F1-F10 with shift
On software keyboards, number keys send F1-F10 with ctrl
Font size can also be changed in per-host settings
Keep unlocked keys in memory until backend service is terminated
Prevent the screen from turning off when working in a console
Prevent Wi-Fi from turning off when a session is active
Vibrate when sending arrow keys; useful for laggy connections
Send notification when a terminal running in the background sounds a bell.
Commands to run on remote server once authenticated
This may help with slower networks
Disable this preference to only use port forwards
Try to reconnect to host if disconnected
Close immediately after remote disconnect without prompting.
Are you sure you want to delete \'%1$s\'?
Are you sure you want to disconnect from all connected hosts?
Attempting \'publickey\' authentication with any in-memory public keys
Selected public key is invalid, try reselecting key in host editor
Attempting \'publickey\' authentication with a specific public key
Session will not be started due to host preference.
Failure! Local shell is unavailable on this phone.
Enter a passphrase to encrypt the key being exported.
Use the same password for encryption.
Tap ‘Menu’ to create or import key pairs.
A key with this nickname already exists.
Network connection lost, waiting to reconnect…
Network connection restored, but IP address has changed. Reconnecting…
Add a font from Google Fonts by its name.
Import a font file from storage (TTF, OTF).
Download failed, tap to try again.
Keep the connection running in the background.
Keep your sessions open even when you switch to other apps.
Play sound when terminal alert is triggered.
Vibrate when a terminal alert is triggered.
Store the login password securely for automatic authentication.
Select a profile to apply its terminal settings.
Force the terminal to a specific size (columns by rows) instead of automatically resizing to fit the screen.
No profiles yet. Tap the + button to create one.
Are you sure you want to delete \'%s\'?
No app available to open this URL.
This type of URL is not supported.
Authentication using the saved password failed.
The biometric key \'%1$s\' has been invalidated. This can happen when new fingerprints are registered on the device. Please generate a new key.
Are you sure you want to delete \"%1$s\"? This action cannot be reversed.
No custom schemes available. Tap ‘New Scheme’ to create one.
This will reset all 256 colours to their default values. This action cannot be reversed.
Built-in schemes are read-only. Duplicate to customise.
Enter text to send to the terminal.
Failed to load port forwarding rules for %1$s: %2$s
Failed to save host configuration for %1$s: %2$s
No URLs found in the terminal buffer.
Encrypted keys cannot be unlocked when the system starts up.
Protect this key using your fingerprint.
No fingerprint registered. Set up fingerprint recognition in the device settings to use this feature.
Fingerprint protection is only available for RSA and EC keys.
Touch the fingerprint sensor to unlock \'%1$s\'.
The port number must be between 1 and 65535.
The format should be host:port (e.g. localhost:80).
ConnectBot needs notification permission to keep your connections active when you switch between apps. Without it, the system may terminate your connections to conserve battery power.
To keep your connections active in the background, please enable notifications for ConnectBot in the system settings.
Connections may be lost if notification permission is not granted.
The connection may be lost when the app is running in the background.
Are you trying to access a host on the local network? Grant the necessary permissions.
Please do not close the app while the migration is in progress.
An error occurred during the database migration: %s
If the problem continues, please report it at %1$s, including a copy of the debug log shown above.
Are you sure you want to disconnect from \'%1$s\'?
Are you sure you want to delete the host \'%1$s\'?
Are you sure you want to delete the stored host keys for \'%1$s\'? You will be prompted to verify the host key the next time you connect.
Select which IP address version to use when connecting.
Unable to connect to jump host %1$s: %2$s
Authentication failed for the jump host: %s
Jump host not found in saved host list.
To report a bug, copy these logs and open a new issue at https://connectbot.org/bug.
Precise colours for machines and people.
A dark theme for the terminal.
An arctic colour palette with a bluish, northerly hue.
A clean and comfortable dark mode.
Add custom TERM values for remote servers.
Imported %1$d hosts (%2$d skipped) and %3$d profiles (%4$d skipped).
Require fingerprint, face recognition, or device PIN when opening the app.
